titleStmt.title: SII 10.6: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 6. (A.R. No. 673 of 1920.) ON A STONE LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF SVAYAMBHUVĒŚVARA, VALIVĒRU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 965.

summary.p: Records a gift of sheep for the upkeep of perpetual lamps in the temple of Tripurushadēva in Valivēru in the Velanāṇḍu district, by general Tikkapayya, Aggiya-Shaḍaṅgavibhaṭṭa and Maṇḍalika Gaṇḍaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavarṣaṁbula 965 nēṇṭi nu
bhānusaṁvatsaramuna nuttarāyaṇa
nimittamuna naggrahāramu velanā
ṇṭi valivēri tripuruṣa dēvaraku
nācaṁdrārkka makhaṇḍavattidiviyalu
mūṇṭiki daṇḍanāyaka tikkapayya nāya
ku liccina goṟiyalu nūṭayēṁbhadi vī
niṁ jēkoni santānakramamuna nityamū
ṇḍu mānikalu nēyi mummaḍi bhī
manaḍaṁ bōyaṁgalavāṇḍu Iddē
varaka yinnaṁdi yagrahāramu pe
ruvalinaggiyaṣaḍaṁggavibhaṭlu
Ācaṁdrārkka makhaṇḍavattidiviya
yokkoṇṭiki niccina goṟiya lēṁbhadi
Iṁdula brahmadēvaraku noṁggēṟumārgga
muna dēseṭṭi mahāsāmanta naṁbayakoḍu
ku maṇḍalika gaṇḍaya yācaṁdrārkamakha
ṇḍavatti diviya yokoṇṭiki niccina goṟi
ya lēṁbhadi Iddēvaraka yiṁdula (incomplete )
Digital edition of SII 10.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
